name: deeplaw
description: DeepLaw 2.0 read-only Agent Knowledge Base for official Chinese legal sources and user-private legal references.

interface.shortDescription: Verify Chinese legal sources, versions, and citations
interface.longDescription: DeepLaw 2.0 turns versioned Chinese legal sources into a bounded, read-only Agent Knowledge Base. A team-maintained official catalog and a physically separate per-user legal-reference library return evidence cards, explicit gaps, receipts, and exact segments without taking ownership of case projects.
defaultPrompt: Verify a Chinese-law question with bounded, version-aware official-source evidence
